title: Endpoint returning the wrong value under Windows11 with 4.7.2
body:
### Issue Description

I think that value for {{.ConnectionInfo.PodmanPipe.Path}} it is somehow being set wrongly or ouput wrongly.
I had an issue trying to get BuildPacks to work with the Gradle SpringBoot Plugin and tried to set up the enviroment variable as per documentation in:
 https://podman-desktop.io/docs/migrating-from-docker/using-the-docker_host-environment-variable

But it never worked, not mater how I tried. The value being returned is: 

```
C:\Users\luist>podman machine inspect --format '{{.ConnectionInfo.PodmanPipe.Path}}'
'\\.\pipe\podman-machine-default'

```
After some frustration trying it I decided to delete the podman machine instance and recreate it.
I found the the output generate by the podman machine start command was:

```
npipe:////./pipe/docker_engine

```

I did not needed to set DOCKER_HOST, and BuildPack gradle build started to work.
I think it was trying to set the DOCKER_HOST to the wrong value, but had no way for find out what was the correct value to use.


```
C:\Users\luist>podman version
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.7.2
API Version:  4.7.2
Go Version:   go1.20.10
Git Commit:   750b4c3a7c31f6573350f0b3f1b787f26e0fe1e3
Built:        Tue Oct 31 14:05:03 2023
OS/Arch:      windows/amd64

Server:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.7.0
API Version:  4.7.0
Go Version:   go1.20.8
Built:        Wed Sep 27 19:24:38 2023
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64

```

comments.body: @ashley-cui @mheon @n1hility what do you make of this?  do we have a problem or was this environmental or ?

I recall us solving this exact problem in the `podman compose` command, in the environment variables we passed to the compose provider - it's one of the two reasons we needed a 4.7.2. So this is definitely a real problem.

https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/20478

We fixed it in compose, so I think we can just also do something similar for inspect. I can probably fix this today, as I'm on windows.

This one is consumed by Podman Desktop https://github.com/containers/podman-desktop/blob/2a4eb0452ef0f4cbc2a65d0f5fdb82cd5b7bc669/extensions/podman/src/extension.ts#L213 

Need to be verified if the other format works well for Podman Desktop
